theme: Seville — Spain's best-kept secret for corporate incentives

linkedin.text:
Everyone takes their team to Barcelona. The smart money is going to Seville.

Seville is what Barcelona was 15 years ago: authentic, affordable, and impossibly beautiful — without the tourist fatigue.

What it delivers for corporate events:
🌺 Flamenco dinner in a centuries-old palace courtyard
🍊 Tapas route through Triana with a local guide
🌴 Alcázar royal palace — private evening access
🥘 Andalusian cooking class with produce straight from the market

The business case:
→ Direct flights from Tel Aviv
→ Warm April–November
→ Hotels 35–40% cheaper than Barcelona
→ Your team has the city to themselves

We have partners on the ground and have been building this destination for 2026. Across 200+ events in 120+ countries since 2010, the off-radar choices are often the ones that impress people who think they've seen it all.

📅 DM us to design a Seville program for your team.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership #Seville
